Senior Backend Engineer — Payments Platform

We are looking for a senior backend engineer to join our payments team. You will
design and operate high-throughput services that move money reliably.

Requirements:
- 6+ years of professional software engineering experience
- Strong Python skills and experience with PostgreSQL
- Hands-on experience running services on AWS
- Experience with Kubernetes and container orchestration
- Familiarity with event-driven architectures

Nice to have:
- Experience leading a small team
- Exposure to Go

Location: Riga, Latvia (hybrid).
